steps.title: Set up the cost
steps.content: The first day costs $430. Each additional day costs $215. For $x$ total days, there are $x-1$ additional days.

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: When $x=1$, the equation gives $y=430$, the first-day cost. When $x=2$, it gives $y=645$, which is $430+215$. That matches choice A, so A is correct.
